name: Orange Yogurt Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together the sugar substitute, orange juice, and grated rind of 1 orange until well combined with the yogurt cheese.
2. Use this spread on bagels, toast, pancakes, or digestive biscuits. If desired, thin it further with additional orange juice for use as a fresh fruit dip.
Note: Each tablespoon contains 19 calories, 1.9g protein, 0.1g fat, and 2.7g carbohydrates.
